title: Operator skill impact first results
claim: The first operator-skill-impact run supports keeping P1 skills cautiously: research-synthesis showed one positive measured lift, while the other P1 skills are keep_observe and do not justify a productivity claim.
invalidates_when: A later full live impact batch contradicts the per-skill decisions or adds human review-burden evidence.
failure_mode: Treating one live batch as proof that skills improve productivity.
review_trigger: Update after another full live batch, routing-variant measurement, or human review-burden scoring.
